diagramConstraints.description: Include explicit start event (circle) and end event (bold circle) nodes
Use diamond shapes for gateways with labels indicating exclusive (XOR), parallel (AND), or inclusive (OR) logic
Organize activities into swim lanes representing different roles or departments
Name tasks with verb-noun format (e.g., 'Review Application', 'Approve Request')

formattingRules.description: Use left-to-right (LR) direction for process flow to match reading direction
